sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35807" key="e)nneapla/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννεα-πλάσιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πλᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ninefold,</tr_> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
